_comment: Client intake brief — the ONLY per-tenant input Seat 1 needs. Copy to seeds/<client>/brief.json, fill it with the client, then run the author-template skill. Fields marked (human) cannot be invented by an agent and must come from real tools or the client.

client.name: Giá Vàng 24h
client.cta: Đăng ký nhận cảnh báo giá

axis._comment: (human) The enumerable data axis behind the pages. No axis → decline.

keywords._comment: (human) Real query data — export from Keyword Planner / GSC / Ahrefs. Sample rows here; full CSV alongside as keywords.csv.

sample.query: giá vàng hôm nay hà nội

serp_refs._comment: Top-ranking URLs for 3–5 target queries; the agent reads these to derive the schema.

hub_and_spoke.sibling_rule: each city page links to 3 nearest provinces, same metal

voice.persona: a calm market analyst, not a hype channel
voice.tone: factual, ngắn gọn, không giật tít
do_not: so sánh nhà vàng cụ thể tiêu cực

rollout.golden_set: 8 cities across regions + both metals, review_sample_pct 100
rollout.refresh: daily price rows re-posted (hash regenerates); prose refresh quarterly via template_version
